name: Granite Speech 4.1 2B on Short Clips (Biased — Single-Block Attention for sub-4 s)
short_description: Per-clip transcription predictions from Granite Speech 4.1 2B (HuggingFace Transformers, bfloat16) on 44 synthetic short clips (0.5-3 s). Labeled 'biased' because all clips are shorter than Granite's 4-second block-attention window, processed via the single-block path with fewer Q-Former acoustic embeddings than longer clips.
model_description: Granite Speech 4.1 2B loaded from /home/azureuser/granite-model/granite-speech-4.1-2b (HuggingFace Transformers, torch_dtype=bfloat16, device_map=cuda). Keyword prompt injection: 'transcribe the speech to text. Keywords: Rezolve, brainpowa, ...' (31 domain terms). Same configuration as t0012 best variant.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: clip_id (string), duration_s (float), transcript (string), is_empty (bool), is_hallucination (bool), latency_seconds (float), ttfd_seconds (float or null), num_chunks (int).

files.description: Per-clip transcription output for 44 synthetic short clips (0.5-3 s) from gold-92 audio
